## Magic square definition

- Can use only digits (0 ... 9)
- Sum of all rows, columns and diagonals is the same
- Numbers could repeat
- Mention the [Google quantum paper](https://quantumai.google/static/site-assets/downloads/cryptocurrency-whitepaper.pdf) where they provide a zk proof of knowing quantum circuits.

## Correct square

square = [
    [8, 1, 6],
    [3, 5, 7],
    [4, 9, 2]
]

## Horizontal but not vertical square

square = [
    [8, 1, 5],
    [2, 5, 7],
    [4, 9, 1]
]

## Vertical but not horizontal square

square = [
    [9, 2, 6],
    [3, 5, 8],
    [4, 9, 2]
]

## Proof bytes
